title: OpenHands Task Payload
description: Schema for task payloads sent from n8n to OpenHands API (POST /api/conversations)

initial_user_message.description: The full task prompt including all context, specifications, and step-by-step instructions for the coding agent

selected_model.description: LLM model identifier in LiteLLM format. Use gemini/ prefix for Gemini models, openrouter/ prefix for OpenRouter models.

runtime_container_image.description: Docker image for the OpenHands sandbox execution environment

confirmation_mode.description: Set to false for fully autonomous execution without confirmation prompts. Factory always uses false.

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of agent action iterations before stopping. Increase for complex multi-file tasks.

examples.initial_user_message:
Clone the repository at https://github.com/org/project.git, branch develop. Implement all React components according to the architecture specification below. Run npm install && npm run build and fix any errors. Commit with message 'feat: initial implementation' and push.

## Architecture
...

ConversationResponse.title: OpenHands Conversation Response
ConversationResponse.description: Shape of the response from GET /api/conversations/{id} — used by n8n polling loop

status.description: n8n polls until status is 'stopped' or 'error'
